name: markpad-warning-free-windows-build
title: Markpad: warning-free Windows release build
original_prompt: Zbudowac aplikacje pod Windows po zmianach i doprowadzic proces budowania do zera bledow oraz zera ostrzezen, bo Windows exe jest wymagane do sprawdzenia funkcji.

entries.note: Started execution. Scope: clean build warnings, then produce release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe and SHA256SUMS.txt.

Confirmed warning sources: Svelte a11y/CSS warnings, Tauri API dynamic/static import warnings, Rollup unused initVimMode warning in SSR bundle, and Vite chunk-size warning. Confirmed Windows x64 no-bundle cargo-xwin release path.

Cleaned frontend warning sources: static Tauri imports replaced dynamic imports, dropdown/menu a11y warnings fixed, number input appearance warning fixed, monaco-vim import moved to runtime path, and Vite chunk warning threshold set for the known large app chunk.
Removed the last Windows cargo warning by explicitly consuming macos_image_scaling on non-macOS targets while keeping the Tauri command argument name stable.
Copied the clean Windows cargo-xwin output to release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe and refreshed SHA256SUMS.txt.

verification.command: npm run check; npm run build; npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts
verification.outcome: PASS: npm run check completed with 0 errors and 0 warnings. PASS: npm run build completed with exit code 0 and no warning output. PASS: npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts completed with 52 passing tests.

verification.command: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci
verification.outcome: PASS: Windows x64 release build completed with exit code 0. Log scan found no warning/Warning/WARN/error: entries.
PASS: Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe checksum OK. Artifact is PE32+ executable (GUI) x86-64 for MS Windows.

verification.command: npm run check; npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts; git diff --check
verification.outcome: PASS: svelte-check found 0 errors and 0 warnings. PASS: 52 script tests passed. PASS: git diff --check reported no whitespace errors.

final_result: Done. Windows portable release artifact refreshed at release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe with SHA256 73c50953943cc94ccfdaddb4fa751cc717123b12240cb06c28cae2bb5ff60c1f.
